0of%20ps%29%7Bif%28p.getBoundingClientRect%28%29.bottom%3E0%29%7Bel%3Dp%3Bbreak%3B%7D%7Dconst%20y0%3Del%3Fel.getBoundingClientRect%28%29.top%3A0%3Bfn%28%29%3Bif%28el%3F.isConnected%29%7Bconst%20dy%3Del.getBoundingClientRect%28%29.top-y0%3Bif%28dy%29window.scrollTo%28%7Btop%3Awindow.scrollY%2Bdy%2Cbehavior%3A%27instant%27%7D%29%3B%7D%7Dfunction%20onScroll%28%29%7Bconst%20bar%3Ddocument.getElementById%28%27ao3-focus-progress%27%29%3Bif%28%21bar%29return%3Bconst%20total%3Ddocument.body.scrollHeight-window.innerHeight%3Bbar.style.width%3Dtotal%3E0%3F%28window.scrollY%2Ftotal%2A100%29%2B%27%25%27%3A%270%25%27%3B%7Dfunction%20onFsChange%28%29%7Bif%28%21document.fullscreenElement%29disable%28%29%3B%7Dfunction%20enable%28%29%7Bif%28document.getElementById%28STYLE_ID%29%29return%3Bdocument.documentElement.requestFullscreen%3F.%28%29.catch%28%28%29%3D%3E%7B%7D%29%3BwithAnchor%28%28%29%3D%3E%7Bconst%20style%3Dmk%28%27style%27%2CSTYLE_ID%29%3Bstyle.textContent%3DCSS%3Bdocument.head.appendChild%28style%29%3Bdocument.body.appendChild%28mk%28%27div%27%2C%27ao3-focus-progress%27%29%29%3Bconst%20skin%3Ddocument.getElementById%28%27workskin%27%29%3Bif%28skin%29hide%28skin%29%3B%7D%29%3Bwindow.addEventListener%28%27scroll%27%2ConScroll%2C%7Bpassive%3Atrue%7D%29%3Bdocument.addEventListener%28%27fullscreenchange%27%2ConFsChange%29%3B%7Dfunction%20disable%28%29%7BwithAnchor%28%28%29%3D%3E%7BOWN.forEach%28id%3D%3Edocument.getElementById%28id%29%3F.remove%28%29%29%3Brestore%28%29%3B%7D%29%3Bwindow.removeEventListener%28%27scroll%27%2ConScroll%29%3Bdocument.removeEventListener%28%27fullscreenchange%27%2ConFsChange%29%3Bif%28document.fullscreenElement%29document.exitFullscreen%3F.%28%29.catch%28%28%29%3D%3E%7B%7D%29%3B%7Ddocument.getElementById%28STYLE_ID%29%3Fdisable%28%29%3Aenable%28%29%3Bwindow.ao3Focus%3D%7Benable%2Cdisable%7D%3B%7D%29%28%29%3B
